snippets.D0001:
-- [mysql] D0001 · Crear base de datos
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0001 · Crear base de datos
CREATE DATABASE demo_db;
snippets.D0002:
-- [mysql] D0002 · Crear tabla
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0002 · Crear tabla
USE demo_db;
CREATE TABLE users (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_users_email(email)
);
snippets.D0003:
-- [mysql] D0003 · Insertar registro
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0003 · Insertar registro
INSERT INTO users(name, email) VALUES ('Ana', 'ana@demo.cl');
snippets.D0004:
-- [mysql] D0004 · Actualizar registro
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0004 · Actualizar registro
UPDATE users SET email = 'ana2@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;
snippets.D0005:
-- [mysql] D0005 · Eliminar registro
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0005 · Eliminar registro
DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1;
snippets.D0006:
-- [mysql] D0006 · Seleccionar con filtro
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0006 · Seleccionar con filtro
SELECT id, name, email, created_at
FROM users
WHERE email LIKE '%@demo.cl'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
snippets.D0007:
-- [mysql] D0007 · Join básico
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0007 · Join básico
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
snippets.D0008:
-- [mysql] D0008 · Crear índice
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0008 · Crear índice
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ix_users_email ON users(email);
snippets.D0010:
-- [mysql] D0010 · Upsert
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0010 · Upsert
INSERT INTO users(name, email)
VALUES ('Ana', 'ana@demo.cl')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
snippets.D0011:
-- [mysql] D0011 · Paginación
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0011 · Paginación
SELECT id, name, email
FROM users
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
snippets.D0012:
-- [mysql] D0012 · Crear vista
-- (script)
-- [MySQL SQL] D0012 · Crear vista
CREATE VIEW v_users AS
SELECT id, name, email FROM users;

snippets.C0676:
-- C0676 · Consulta agregada + GROUP BY + HAVING (Intermedio, Base de datos)
-- Supón tabla sales(customer_id, amount)
SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM sales
GROUP BY customer_id
HAVING SUM(amount) > 100
ORDER BY total DESC;
snippets.C0677:
-- C0677 · Window Functions (ROW_NUMBER/LAG/SUM OVER) (Avanzado, Base de datos)
-- MySQL 8+ / PostgreSQL / SQL Server
SELECT customer_id, amount,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rn
FROM sales;

SELECT customer_id, sale_date, amount,
       amount - LAG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY sale_date) AS delta
FROM sales;

SELECT customer_id, sale_date, amount,
       SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY sale_date
                         ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_total
FROM sales;
snippets.C0678:
-- C0678 · CTE recursivo (jerarquía/árbol) (Avanzado, Base de datos)
-- MySQL 8+ WITH RECURSIVE
WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (
  SELECT id, parent_id, name, 0 AS depth
  FROM categories
  WHERE parent_id IS NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.name, p.depth + 1
  FROM categories c
  JOIN cte p ON p.id = c.parent_id
)
SELECT * FROM cte
ORDER BY depth, id;
